subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-26
subcodes.first_line: I always derive great pleasure from being with you. I shall always remember these gatherings. I shall never forget them.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از ملاقات شماها کمال سرور حاصل مینمایم همیشه این محافل را در خاطر خواهم داشت ابداً فراموش نخواهم نمود
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
